title: `Adriy'el #5741
definition:
Adriel = "flock of God"

 1) son of Barzillai, and the man to whom Saul gave his daughter Merab
    in marriage although she was already promised to David
nasbUsage:
Definition: Adriel = "flock of God"

 1) son of Barzillai, and the man to whom Saul gave his daughter Merab
    in marriage although she was already promised to David

    NASB:  my help is God, son-in-law of Saul
